title: kobresia lancea
intro: Kobresia lancea, also known as Lance-leaved Kobresia, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Kobresia lancea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
